data.title: Willis accelerates growth in Japan with talent hires and expansion into specialty lines
data.description:
Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ:WTW) announced a significant expansion of its Japanese Corporate Risk & Broking team.

This talent expansion enhances Willis’ ability to meet rising demand from companies in Japan, as well as provide insights, data, and analytics to inform and better manage both insurance transactions and wider risk management for its clients.

data.title: Boeing and Machinists union said to resume contract talks Monday
data.description:
Boeing (NYSE:BA) and Machinists union officials are slated to resume contract negotiations on Monday, Reuters reported, citing a union official.

Boeing (NYSE:BA) Defense workers assembling F-15 and F/A-18 in the St. Louis area and Illinois have been on strike since August 4, 2025.

The workers rejected Boeing's (NYSE:BA) offer of a 20% wage increase, a $5,000 ratification bonus, more vacation and sick leave, and a path to higher wages.

The company has managed to maintain production, flight testing and other work so far using non-union workers, Boeing Defense spokesperson Didi VanNierop said.

data.title: Charter adds ESPN DTC, Disney+ and Hulu Bundle to eligible Spectrum plans at no extra cost
data.description:
ESPN DTC Unlimited plan and the Disney+ (NYSE:DIS), Hulu Bundle are now included at no extra cost for customers with eligible Spectrum TV plans, Charter Communications (NASDAQ:CHTR) said in a statement.

Spectrum said that the ESPN DTC Unlimited plan, which retails for $29.99 per month, is now available at no additional cost for customers with eligible Spectrum TV plans.

Additionally, Hulu, which retails in combination with Disney+ as the Disney+, Hulu Bundle for $10.99 per month, is now included for customers with qualifying video plans.

The addition of both services significantly enhances the value of Spectrum’s Seamless Entertainment experience, which now includes access to leading streaming apps, including Disney+, worth more than $100 per month, the company said.

Disney-owned sports network ESPN and Fox (FOX) (FOXA) have tied up to offer their upcoming direct-to-consumer streaming services in a bundled plan.

data.title: SpaceX scrubs Starship test flight minutes before liftoff due to ground system issue
data.description:
• SpaceX (SPACE) has called off a planned test flight of its Starship mega rocket following an issue at the launch site.
  • About 30 minutes before the planned liftoff at its Texas launch facility on Sunday, SpaceX said that it was abandoning its 10th test flight to “allow time to troubleshoot an issue with ground systems”.
  • "Standing down from today's tenth flight of Starship to allow time to troubleshoot an issue with ground systems," SpaceX announced at 7:13 p.m. EDT (2313 GMT) on Sunday in a post on X, the social media site owned by SpaceX founder and CEO Elon Musk.
  • The now-canceled tenth Starship flight was seen as a key milestone for Elon Musk’s SpaceX. The first two Starship launches in 2025 ended in explosions within minutes, while the third failed to deploy its satellites and lost control during flight.

data.title: SK hynix begins mass production of 321-layer QLC NAND Flash
data.description:
• SK hynix (OTCPK:HXSCF) has completed development of its 321-layer 2Tb QLC NAND flash product and has begun mass production.
  • The company plans to release the product in the first half of next year following completion of global customer validation.
  • To maximize the cost competitiveness of its new product, SK hynix (OTCPK:HXSCF) developed a 2Tb device with double the capacity of existing solutions.

data.title: Rocket Lab launches 70th Electron mission
data.description:
• Rocket Lab (NASDAQ:RKLB) launched its 70th Electron mission on Saturday, making Electron the most frequently launched small orbital rocket.
  • The ‘Live, Laugh, Launch’ mission lifted off from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 in Mahia, New Zealand, on August 23 at 22:42 UTC, less than three weeks after Electron’s previous successful launch from the same site.
  • Rocket Lab's stock (NASDAQ:RKLB) is up 74% this year, driven by strong Q2 results that included 36% revenue growth, higher margins, and improved cash flow, supporting a bullish long-term outlook.

data.title: Rio Tinto reports fatal incident at Simandou project
data.description:
• Rio Tinto (NYSE:RIO) Saturday said that an employee of a contracting company has died following an incident at the SimFer mine site in Nzérékoré, Guinea on Friday 22 August.
  • All activity at the SimFer mine site is currently suspended, and support is in place for colleagues impacted by this event.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric, ITRI and TTL Jhunan Brewery partner on CO₂ capture demo in Taiwan
data.description:
Mitsubishi Electric (OTCPK:MIELY) has signed a collaboration agreement with the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) and the Taiwan Tobacco & Liquor  (TTL) Jhunan Brewery covering their planned demonstration tests of the process of capturing and utilizing CO2.

Under this agreement, Mitsubishi Electric, ITRI, and TTL will capture CO2 emitted from TTL Jhunan Brewery and purify it for use in a beer production line, aiming to thereby achieve carbon recycling.

data.title: XPENG launches global OTA 5.8.0 update
data.description:
• XPENG Motors (NYSE:XPEV) on Monday said that starting August 25, it will roll out the global OTA upgrade of XOS 5.8.0.
  • With XOS 5.8.0, the third major OTA release of 2025 follows the widely acclaimed versions XOS 5.4.5 in January and XOS 5.6.0 in May.
  • Owners will receive real-time alerts via the XPENG app and can remotely activate or deactivate the mode.

data.title: Thoma Bravo nears $2B deal for Verint Systems - Bloomberg
data.description:
Thoma Bravo is close to a deal to acquire call center software maker Verint Systems (NASDAQ:VRNT) in a deal that would value the call center software maker at ~$2B including debt, Bloomberg reported Sunday.

An agreement could be announced as soon as Monday, but no final decision has been made, according to the report.

Verint Systems (NASDAQ:VRNT), whose shares have dropped 38% in the past year, rose 6% in Friday's trading, giving the company a market value of ~$1.2B.

Bloomberg reported several weeks ago that Thoma Bravo was negotiating the terms of a potential deal for Verint (VRNT).
